zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron於1239年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。她於大約1255年與Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1320年在蘇格蘭享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron于1239年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾。她于大约1255年与Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1320年在苏格兰享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Roberta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron was born in 1239, in Argyll, Scotland. She married Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron about 1255, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1320, in Scotland, at the age of 81, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron est née en 1239, à Argyll, Écosse. Elle a épousé Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron environ 1255, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1320, à Écosse, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron wurde 1239 in Argyll, Scotland geboren. Sie hat um 1255 in Scotland Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron è nata il nel 1239 nel Argyll, Scotland. Lei sposato Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron circa 1255, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1320, nel Scotland, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameronは1239年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた。約1255年にスコットランドでSir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1320年にスコットランドで81歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron(은)는 1239년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 스컷랜드에서 Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 스컷랜드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Ballegarno Castle, Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron nasceu em 1239, em Argyll, Scotland. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron aproximadamente 1255, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1320, em Scotland, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron родилась в 1239 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron около 1255 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Roberta Cameron nació en 1239, en Argyll, Scotland. Se casó con Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron aproximadamente 1255, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1320, en Scotland, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
